key_decisions.original_text: Store 3 epochs of PTC in consensus state (previous + next 2 epochs)
key_decisions.context: enables testability and eliminates caching bugs

key_decisions.original_text: Variable PTC deadline deferred; can add post-fork if needed
Defer minor 8037 spec changes to bal-devnet-4 to stabilize devnet-3
ePBS devnet-1 focuses on structure testing, not builder API or benchmarking
